records.question: Which players died in Kalamazoo, MI?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT player.player_id FROM player
JOIN player_college ON player.player_id = player_college.player_id
JOIN college ON player_college.college_id = college.college_id
WHERE player.death_city = 'Kalamazoo' AND player.death_state = 'MI'
records.pred_sql: SELECT player_id FROM player WHERE death_city = 'Kalamazoo' AND death_state = 'MI'

records.question: Which players were born in 1960, died in Poway, USA, throw left-handed, weigh exactly 185, have been all-stars, and won a player award with a note of 'OF' in the year 1990?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT player.player_id FROM player
JOIN all_star ON player.player_id = all_star.player_id
JOIN player_award ON player.player_id = player_award.player_id
WHERE player.death_city = 'Poway' AND player_award.notes = 'OF' AND player.throws = 'L' AND player.death_country = 'USA' AND player.weight = 185 AND player.birth_year = 1960 AND player_award.year = 1990
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT
  T1.player_id
FROM player AS T1
INNER JOIN all_star AS T2
  ON T1.player_id = T2.player_id
INNER JOIN player_award AS T3
  ON T1.player_id = T3.player_id
WHERE
  T1.birth_year = 1960 AND T1.death_city = 'Poway' AND T1.death_country = 'USA' AND T1.throws = 'L' AND T1.weight = 185 AND T3.notes = 'OF' AND T3.year = 1990

records.question: What players were born in Pensacola, are 72 inches tall, bat right-handed, throw right-handed, debuted on 2010-04-30, were born in a month at most 12, and played exactly one all-star game with game number 0?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT player.player_id FROM player
JOIN all_star ON player.player_id = all_star.player_id
WHERE player.birth_city = 'Pensacola' AND all_star.game_num = 0 AND player.debut = '2010-04-30' AND player.birth_month <= 12 AND all_star.gp = 1 AND player.bats = 'R' AND player.throws = 'R' AND player.height = 72
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.player_id FROM player AS T1 INNER JOIN all_star AS T2 ON T1.player_id = T2.player_id WHERE T1.birth_city = 'Pensacola' AND T1.height = 72 AND T1.bats = 'R' AND T1.throws = 'R' AND T1.debut = '2010-04-30' AND T1.birth_month <= 12 AND T2.game_num = 0 GROUP BY T1.player_id HAVING COUNT(T2.game_id) = 1

records.question: Which players born in Beaumont in month 8 have been selected as all-stars and have also won a manager award?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT player.player_id FROM player
JOIN all_star ON player.player_id = all_star.player_id
JOIN manager_award ON player.player_id = manager_award.player_id
WHERE player.birth_city = 'Beaumont' AND player.birth_month = 8
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.player_id FROM player AS T1 INNER JOIN all_star AS T2 ON T1.player_id = T2.player_id INNER JOIN manager_award AS T3 ON T1.player_id = T3.player_id WHERE T1.birth_city = 'Beaumont' AND T1.birth_month = 8

records.question: Which players with the last name Collins were born in month 5 or earlier and have received awards?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT player.player_id FROM player
JOIN player_award ON player.player_id = player_award.player_id
WHERE player.birth_month <= 5 AND player.name_last = 'Collins'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT
  T1.player_id
FROM player AS T1
INNER JOIN player_award AS T2
  ON T1.player_id = T2.player_id
WHERE
  T1.name_last = 'Collins' AND T1.birth_month <= 5

records.question: Who are the players named Curt from Anchorage who debuted on 1988-09-07, are at most 77 inches tall, were born in 1966 or later, and have both all-star appearances and player awards?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT player.player_id FROM player
JOIN all_star ON player.player_id = all_star.player_id
JOIN player_award ON player.player_id = player_award.player_id
WHERE player.name_first = 'Curt' AND player.height <= 77 AND player.birth_city = 'Anchorage' AND player.birth_year >= 1966 AND player.debut = '1988-09-07'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.player_id FROM player AS T1 WHERE T1.name_first = 'Curt' AND T1.birth_city = 'Anchorage' AND T1.debut = '1988-09-07' AND T1.height <= 77 AND T1.birth_year >= 1966 AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM all_star AS T2 WHERE T2.player_id = T1.player_id ) AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM player_award AS T3 WHERE T3.player_id = T1.player_id )
